name: Cowboy Caviar
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Black Beans, rinsed and drained
4 oz Ripe Olives, chopped and drained
2 Large Eggs, hard cooked and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain 15 ounces of black beans.
2. Drain and chop 4 ounces of ripe olives.
3. Finely chop 1/4 cup of onion (using 1 small onion).
4. Finely chop 1 clove of garlic.
5. In a large bowl, combine the chopped beans, olives, onion, and garlic.
6. Add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil, 2 tablespoons of lime juice, 1/4 teaspoon of salt, 1/4 teaspoon of red pepper flakes, 1/4 teaspoon of cumin, and 1/8 teaspoon of black pepper to the bowl.
7. Mash the mixture until well combined.
8. Add the softened cream cheese (1 pack) and chopped eggs (2 large, hard cooked).
9. Gently fold all ingredients together until evenly distributed.
10. Sliced green onion tops are added for garnish.
